title: megalastrum galeottii
intro: Megalastrum galeottii, also known as the "Galeotti's fern", is a species of fern in the family Osmundaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Megalastrum galeottii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Megalastrum galeottii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by decocting them in a solvent to create a tea or tincture for medicinal use.
